posts.angle: AI adoption creates more recurring subscriptions that need a reliable payment layer
posts.copy:
AI tool adoption keeps growing.

With the rise of AI agents and orchestration, teams are managing more recurring subscriptions than ever. RichXPay offers virtual cards funded via USDT or USDC.
sourceTitles: The next phase of the Microsoft OpenAI partnership
An open-source spec for orchestration: Symphony
posts.landingSummary: Subscription payment page focused on recurring billing stability and virtual-card management.
